name: F7-curation-manipulation
notes: Phase 2 onset fixture. F7 was introduced by ADR 0022 (community bounty pool) and admits whale or sybil-cluster manipulation of the demand-side sponsorship pool. The defence is HM-REQ-0140's per-sponsor cap (≤50% of pool) plus the minimum-2-distinct-sponsors floor; the fixture documenting actual residual damage requires Phase 2 pool-data calibration to populate. Until then, this placeholder file exists so docs/spec/00.5-foundations.md § F7's reference resolves under the lychee link check, and the HM-REQ-0090 adversarial-simulator coverage requirement has a target. The acceptance scenario, residual-damage description, and defended-cases will be filled in during Phase 2 mid-point review.
